zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Burnell於1410年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼時，她的父親Sir Edward Burnell39歲，母親Alianore le Strange35歲。她於1426年與Sir Edmund Hungerford在英國結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和15個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年3月27日在她的家鄉享年94歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Burnell was born in 1410, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Edward Burnell, was 39 and her mother, Alianore le Strange, was 35. She married Sir Edmund Hungerford in 1426, in England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 15 daughters. She died on 27 March 1504, in her hometown, at the age of 94, and was buried in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Burnell est née en 1410, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Burnell, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alianore le Strange, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Hungerford en 1426, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 15 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Burnell 1410 in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Burnell 39 und ihre Mutter Alianore le Strange 35. Sie hat 1426 in England Sir Edmund Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 15 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1504 im Alter von 94 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Burnell è nata il nel 1410 nel Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Edward Burnell, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Alianore le Strange, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund Hungerford nel 1426, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 15 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Burnellが1410年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Burnellは39歳，母Alianore le Strangeは35歳であった。1426年にイギリスでSir Edmund Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と15人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年3月27日に故郷で94歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Burnell(이)가 1410년 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Burnell(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianore le Strange(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1426년 영국에서 Sir Edmund Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 3월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Burnell nasceu em 1410, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Burnell, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alianore le Strange, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund Hungerford em 1426, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 15 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Burnell родилась в 1410 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Burnell было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore le Strange, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Hungerford в 1426 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 15 дочерей. Она умерла 27 марта 1504 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Burnell nació en 1410, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Burnell, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alianore le Strange, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund Hungerford en 1426, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 15 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
